title: Instrument de ratification britannique du traité entre les Alliés et la Grèce relatif au statut de la Grèce et à la protection des minorités ethniques, du Traité entre les Alliés et la Grèce à propos de la Thrace et du Protocole relatif au traité conclu à Sèvres entre les principales puissances alliées et la Grèce le 10 août 1920 et au traité conclu à la même date entre les mêmes puissances relativement à la Thrace
text_preview: George, be the Grace of Bod, of the United Tingdom of Great Jritain and Freland and of the British Dominions beyond the Seas Ring, Defender of the faith, Emperor of India, Sc., Sc., 8c. To all and singular to whom these Presents shall come, Greeting I Wilbereas a Treaty between Us and France, Italy and Japan on the one hand, and Greece on the other hand, relating to the Protection of Minorities in Greece, was conclu…

pages.text:
George, be the Grace of Bod, of the

United Tingdom of Great Jritain and Freland and of the British

Dominions beyond the Seas Ring,

Defender of the faith, Emperor of India, Sc., Sc., 8c. To all and singular to whom these Presents shall come, Greeting I

Wilbereas a Treaty between Us and

France, Italy and Japan on

the one hand, and

Greece on the other hand, relating to the Protection of Minorities in Greece, was concluded and signed at

Sèvres on the Tenth day of August, in the year of

Our Lord One

Thousand Nine Hundred and

Twenty, by the Plenipotentiaries of Us and of

France, Italy, Japan and Greece duly and respectively authorised for that purpose, which Treaty is, word for word, as follows:-

Elno whereas a Treaty between Us and the said Powers and States, relative to Thrace, was also concluded and signed at Sèvres on the Tenth day of August, in the year of Our Lord One

Thousand Nine Hundred and Twenty, by the

Plenipotentiaries of Us and of the said Powers and

States duly and

respectively authorised for that

purpose, which Treaty is, word for word, as follows:—

(

Elnd whereas a Protocol between Us and the said Powers and States, relating to the two

Treaties aforementioned, was concluded and signed at Lausanne on the Twenty-fourth day of July, in the year of Our Lord One Thousand Nine Hundred and Twenty-three, by the Plenipotentiaries of Us and of the said Powers and States, which Protocol is, word for word, as follows:—

Tle, having seen and considered

the

Treaties aforesaid as modified by the said Protocol, have approved, accepted, and confirmed the same in all and every one of their Articles and Clauses, as

We do by these Presents approve, accept, confirm, and ratify them

for Ourselves,

Our Heirs and

Successors: engaging and promising upon Our Royal

Word that We will sincerely and faithfully perform and observe all and singular the things which are contained and expressed in the Treaties aforesaid, and that We will never suffer the same to be violated by any one, or transgressed in

any manner, as far as

it lies in Our power. For the greater testimony and validity of all which, We have caused Our Great Seal to be affixed to these Presents, which We have signed with Our Royal Hand.

Given at Our Court of St. James, the

Tenth day of July, in the year of Our Lord

One Thousand Nine Hundred and Twenty-four, and in the Fifteenth year of Our Reign.

LengeR!
